title: Duschekia crispa
intro: Duschekia crispa, also known as Chrysanthemum crispum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and sore throats. Bioactive constituents of Duschekia crispa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Duschekia crispa is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to make herbal remedies for colds, flu, and respiratory infections.
